title: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) Workflow in a Data Structures Course
description: A flowchart depicting the sequence of activities and feedback loops in the Continuous Internal Evaluation process for a Data Structures module, demonstrating how data from assessments is collected, processed, and used.
elements: CIE Assessment Creation (Quizzes, Programming Assignments, Mini-Projects)
relationships: Assessment creation leads to student submission/performance, which is evaluated and data is collected. This data is aggregated and analyzed. The analysis leads to feedback for both student and instructor. Based on feedback, remedial action may be triggered, creating a loop. The final analyzed data is used to calculate the CIE score.
